story.text: As a managing session and as bdo, I want the first real Field on the trunk - and it is there now, measurable: loop/field.py (landed by rcp.merge.101 on bdo's arc confirmation adm.6e3ccedc1f0b) is a pure read-only fold that, given one arc, produces the decomposition ladder arc -> epic -> story -> task -> environment -> node -> occupant, each rung carrying state, evidence as record ids, and one next_safe_move that routes through an existing pen or honestly names bdo. The disciplines are in code and pinned by tests/test_field.py (suite 572 green): task and environment surface as named gaps rather than invented rungs (a §10 test fails a fabricated clean ladder three ways), and occupancy carries authority - an occupant no node_real admission ever named renders UN-AUTHORISED, a superseded stage side as an authorised alias. This v1 answers v0's missed (rcp.3e08d1446381): value-confirm caught the claim/delivery gap - ready_for_spec was reached, the spec was never built - and the move it named is done: the fold was built against done-line 0050, landed, and this version re-announces citing the delivery evidence instead of the intention.

_note: v1 re-versions after value-confirm's missed on v0 (rcp.3e08d1446381) - the second real missed on the log, and the first whose named move was completed the same day: build loop/field.py against done-line 0050, land it (rcp.merge.101), re-announce. v0's refusal stands as history (I-2); this version's claims cite the receipts that make them true, the gates-enumerated.v3 pattern.
